standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: التفاعل مع اللغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في عروض قصيرة بسيطة وتعليمات وأسئلة ومحادثات موجهة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Interact with spoken English in short, simple presentations, instructions, questions and guided conversations
indicators: Follow simple instructions in activities and games
Identify people and objects based on oral description (She wears a blue jacket.)
Respond to simple questions before, during and after listening
Listen to, join in and recite simple chants and songs

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: فهم الكلمات والعبارات والجمل المنطوقة البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Comprehend simple spoken words, phrases and sentences
indicators: Identify words in an utterance
Draw, select or write simple words in response to questions on oral material
Recognize basic stress and intonation patterns
Segment words into syllables
Use pictures, illustrations and visual aids to understand unfamiliar words
Use words (e.g., Excuse/Pardon me) or body language (facial expressions) to demonstrate lack of understanding
Practice social (communicative) skills such as nodding, smiling and giving feedback

standards.nameAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة من خلال إنتاج كلمات ثنائية المقاطع وعبارات نمطية بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Develop speaking strategies by producing two-syllable words and simple formulaic utterances

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: نطق الكلمات والتعبيرات بالنبر والتنغيم الصحيح
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Pronounce words and expressions with correct stress and intonation
indicators: Pronounce two-syllable words and expressions using the correct stress and intonation with teacher guidance
Recite rhymes and songs, individually and in groups with correct stress and intonation

standards.nameAr: التحدث للتواصل والتفاعل من خلال إنتاج تبادلات قصيرة باستخدام تراكيب مختلفة
standards.nameEn: Speak to communicate and interact by producing short exchanges using different structures

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة للتواصل بدقة أساسية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop speaking strategies to communicate with basic accuracy
indicators: Participate in exchanges following a model
Express habits and facts in positive and negative statements using the simple present tense (I eat an apple every day. I do not eat fish.)
Express past events in positive and negative statements using the simple past (I played football yesterday; I did not study.)
Express likes and dislikes in positive and negative statements (I like football; I do not like swimming.)
Express ability using can and cannot (can't)
Politely respond to invitations or requests

Partake in short formulaic exchanges using the vocabulary introduced (A: What is your name? B: My name is Ahmad? A: How old are you? B: I am six years old. A: How many brothers and sisters do you have? B: I have two sisters and one brother.)

standards.nameAr: القراءة لفهم المواد المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Read to comprehend written materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات القراءة لفهم مواد القراءة الأصيلة البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop reading strategies to understand simple authentic reading materials
indicators: Identify and read sight words using prior lexical knowledge, phonic knowledge, context and sound-letter correspondences
Identify elements of a short story (e.g., setting, characters, plot) using wh-questions
Demonstrate use of decoding skills and context when reading new words in a text
Use pictures and other visual clues to predict the meaning of simple words and phrases
Distinguish print lines from sentences
Identify basic sentence punctuation: capital letters, full stops and question marks
Read short simple or compound sentences with, and, or, but
Read phonetically regular words having the same letters with different sounds (e.g., hard and soft /c/ and /g/ as in city/cat and gem, gold)
Decode simple messages in simple reading texts
Refer to certain lines when relating content of a text
Expand vocabulary to include new ones in reading texts
Relate main idea in a simple text with the help of the teacher
Break up longer words into syllables while reading

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للمواد المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to written materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار فهم مواد القراءة اليومية القصيرة البسيطة من خلال الاستجابة للتعليمات المكتوبة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate understanding of short simple everyday reading materials by responding to written instructions
indicators: Use newly acquired words in the right context
Follow and respond to two-step written instructions
Make connections between instructions and short simple written materials
Answer simple questions about written materials
Read texts aloud with expression at an appropriate and reasonable speed

standards.nameAr: التعرف على أن الكتابة يمكن أن تكون منظمة بطرق للتعبير عن أغراض مختلفة
standards.nameEn: Recognize that writing can be structured in ways to express different purposes

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: سرد قصة أو وصف شيء أو مكان باستخدام جمل بسيطة من 4-6 كلمات
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Narrate a story or describe an object or place using simple sentences of 4-6 words
indicators: Spell simple words and phrases correctly
Write basic phrases to describe objects and pictures
Write simple sentences
Use the stages of the writing process to develop, organize and present ideas in writing
Write a one-paragraph story using simple sentences
Write a description of a certain object or place using simple sentences
Revise written task based on teacher's feedback

learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Revise written work with the assistance of the peers
indicators: Learn to accept peer review and objectively discuss criticism
Revise written task based on peer feedback

standards.nameAr: عرض المواد المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: View visual materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: البدء بتحديد مجموعة من النصوص المرئية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Begin to identify a range of visual texts
indicators: Realize that shapes, symbols and colors have meaning and begin to include them in short oral presentations
Observe visual images and begin to appreciate that they have been created for particular purposes

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للمواد المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to visual materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تفسير والاستجابة لمجموعة من محفزات النص المرئي
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Interpret and respond to a range of visual text prompts
indicators: Deduce the purpose of visual texts relating it to his/her personal experiences
Discuss his/her own feelings by showing empathy for the way others might feel

Discuss the information being conveyed in illustrations in picture books and simple reference books use body language in a variety of ways such as mime and role play to visually communicate ideas and feelings
Use new vocabulary acquired in reading texts and appropriate terms and expressions to discuss visual texts
